title: NoSQL for modern apps and AI: The future of Memorystore, Firestore, and Bigtable
summary: Google Cloud presented advancements in Memorystore, Firestore, and Bigtable NoSQL databases with features designed for AI and modern application workloads. The session covered product releases, architectural innovations, and roadmaps for agentic and AI app experiences.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech session covers advancements across three NoSQL databases (Memorystore, Firestore, and Bigtable) with features aimed at AI and modern application workloads. It walks through product releases, architectural innovations, and roadmaps for agentic and AI app experiences. For an audience tracking how managed databases adapt to AI, the relevant threads are vector search and support for AI agents within each system.
